name: Google Custom Search
description: Google Custom Search API (Programmable Search Engine) provides programmatic access to Google search results. Execute web and image searches with advanced filtering by language, country, date, file type, and safe search. Supports both open web search and site-restricted search within configured domains.

capabilities.name: search_list
capabilities.description: Execute a web or image search query with advanced filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: search_siterestrict_list
capabilities.description: Execute a search restricted to sites configured in the Programmable Search Engine.
